text:
was a Marleyan city located on the continental mainland's northern coast. 

Situation

Not much is known about Karifa other than its topography as a large coastal city in the northern part of Marley. Surrounded by mountains, the altitudes in Karifa went higher inland. The city possessed a huge harbor that accommodated the largest naval fleet ever gathered in human history.

Story

War for Paradis arc

After Eren Jaeger begins the Rumbling on Paradis Island, the Marleyan airships stationed on the southern coast of Paradis retreat to the continental mainland to warn the military of the incoming attack. This leads to a city-wide evacuation from Karifa and its neighboring regions, with the Global Alliance organizing a large naval blockade consisting of the Global Allied Fleet on the coast of Karifa. Equipped with the world's most advanced anti-Titan artillery, many of the naval vessels triumph in an initial wave of attack before their forces are overwhelmed by the advance of the Wall Titans. All fleets are slaughtered, and the Rumbling destroys the city.

Later, in pursuit of Eren amid the Rumbling, the allied remnants of the Scout Regiment, Marleyan military, and Anti-Marleyan Volunteers arrive at Odiha, where Yelena confesses to discussing a strategy with Eren to cripple Marley's military defenses with a partial Rumbling to secure peace on Paradis for several decades to come. She had singled out Karifa as the likely gathering point for a Global Allied Fleet, which would inevitably be summoned after Eren's planned raid on Liberio. Despite her guarantee of a temporary peace with a strike against Karifa, she had shown some concern regarding Fort Salta in southern Marley. With Eren leading a full-scale Rumbling against the entire world, Yelena guesses that after destroying Karifa, he would target Fort Salta to completely rid Marley of any weapons against the Founding Titan.

Trivia

Unlike the majority of Marleyan location names which are based in Latin or Italian nomenclature, "Karifa" is simply the katakana for reversed. This may refer to the Marleyan continental mainland being based on the real-world continent of mirrored vertically.
If mirrored vertically, Karifa's location according to Yelena appears to correspond roughly with in .
